About Us

We believe dentistry should be as comfortable as it is advanced. Our mission is to provide high-quality care that improves your overall well-being.

Our Vision

To be the Lake Norman region's premier destination for personalized dental care, where every patient feels like family. We envision a world where dental anxiety is a thing of the past, replaced by confidence in modern technology and the human touch.

Our Mission

Davidson & Burr is committed to delivering comprehensive, patient-centered dentistry. By combining Dr. Davidson and Dr. Burr's expertise with the latest in 3D scanning and sedation techniques, we ensure every smile we treat is healthy, functional, and beautiful.

D'Lux Premium Dental Clinic

Luxury dental care in Yangon, Myanmar. Where precision meets comfort.
